name: Lobule Convergence Study
pi: Uta Dahmen, Matthias König, Tim Ricken, Hans-Michael Tautenhahn
description: Multiscale coupled model of a 3D liver lobule sixth (wedge geometry) using the Theory of Porous Media (TPM) with the SPT cell model for drug metabolism and necrosis. Four mesh resolutions for convergence analysis. Solved with FEBio + libRoadRunner.
